title: Fixed #27421 aritfact push and pull with authfile
body:
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

For more detailed information, please review our contributing guidelines:
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests
-->

#### Checklist

Ensure you have completed the following checklist for your pull request to be reviewed:
<!-- Use [x] to mark as done, or click the checkbox after opening PR -->

- [x] Certify you wrote the patch or otherwise have the right to pass it on as an open-source patch by signing all
commits. (`git commit -s`). (If needed, use `git commit -s --amend`).  The author email must match
the sign-off email address. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#sign-your-prs)
for more information.
- [x] Referenced issues using `Fixes: #00000` in commit message (if applicable)
- [x] [Tests](https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/main/test#readme) have been added/updated (or no tests are needed)
- [x] [Documentation](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/README.md) has been updated (or no documentation changes are needed)
- [x] All commits pass `make validatepr` (format/lint checks)
- [x] [Release note](https://github.com/kubernetes/community/blob/master/contributors/guide/release-notes.md) entered in the section below (or `None` if no user-facing changes)

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
Write `None` if there are no user-facing changes, otherwise enter your release note below.
Include "action required" if users need to take action when upgrading.
-->

```release-note
Fixes the #27431, `artifact` to use `authfile` when push and pull 
```

comments.body: you need to rebase to pick up a fix for those test failures (not caused by this PR).

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *nimdrak* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

LGTM
once the tests are happy
After adding a new option, it should also be noted in the relevant documentation.

@zhangguanzhang Thanks for your review.
I think it's okay because they are already documented.
- https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/2b646e7cb7249373b6b5073dc53a77ad1e1a0aba/docs/source/markdown/podman-artifact-push.1.md.in#L19
- https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/2b646e7cb7249373b6b5073dc53a77ad1e1a0aba/docs/source/markdown/podman-artifact-pull.1.md.in#L24

I lately discovered a failure in the `podman-remote` integration test for `podman artifact push and pull with authfile`.

```
$ FOCUS="podman artifact push and pull with authfile" make remoteintegration
...
Running: /home/nimdrak/githubs/podman/bin/podman-remote --remote --url unix:///run/user/1000/podman-27f996ba6f4ace2d44a8faf02036e693e8773bc553ddcffd8afe5142ac0efae3.sock artifact push -q --authfile /tmp/nonexistent --tls-verify=false localhost:40257/test/artifact1

  Error: credential file is not accessible: faccessat /tmp/nonexistent: no such file or directory

  Running: /home/nimdrak/githubs/podman/bin/podman-remote --remote --url unix:///run/user/1000/podman-27f996ba6f4ace2d44a8faf02036e693e8773bc553ddcffd8afe5142ac0efae3.sock artifact push -q --authfile /home/nimdrak/tmp/podman-e2e-37057947/subtest-3709030926/p/auth.json --tls-verify=false localhost:40257/test/artifact1

  Error: trying to reuse blob sha256:0647a475f23382b694f0ef6864216dbfa6fdf979f8fde73ad7bbcfd547178b05 at destination: checking whether a blob sha256:0647a475f23382b694f0ef6864216dbfa6fdf979f8fde73ad7bbcfd547178b05 exists in localhost:40257/test/artifact1: authentication required

  [FAILED] Command failed with exit status 125. See above for error message.
...
```

So, I added the missing logic of `PushArtifact` in `pkg/api/handlers/libpod/artifacts.go`
These failed tests seem unrelated to this PR.
